Thanks for contributing! Please make sure your PR targets `main` and that the
checklist below is satisfied. See CONTRIBUTING.md for details.
-->

## Description

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] I read the [contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `yarn test` passes.
- [ ] `yarn build` passes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it made sense.
- [ ] I formatted the code with Prettier.
- [ ] I bumped the version in `packages/main-library/package.json` (if this should be released).
